title: Ash Planes
description: Generates airplanes flying across your Minecraft world!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The AshPlanes Datapack brings the Overworld to life by generating various types of flying aircraft, making the skies feel more dynamic and immersive. Whether you're exploring, building a modern city, or just enjoying the scenery, this datapack adds a realistic touch to your Minecraft world.

✈️ Features:

✔ Randomly Spawning Aircraft – Different flying vehicles appear naturally in the Overworld.
✔ Diverse Air Fleet – Includes commercial airliners, Concorde, helicopters, and airships.
✔ Automatic Functionality – No commands needed; everything runs seamlessly in the background.

🌍 Spawn Mechanics:

Aircraft spawn randomly at various locations across the Overworld.
They appear at different altitudes, ensuring a natural, realistic feel.
Works in singleplayer and multiplayer without issues.

⚙️ How to Install:

Download the AshPlanes Datapack.
Open your Minecraft world folder (.minecraft/saves/Your_World_Name).
Place the datapack file into the datapacks folder inside your world folder.
Launch Minecraft and enter your world.
Type /reload (if already in the world) to activate the datapack.

🗺️ Model Credits:

All aircraft models used in this datapack are taken from the [Matts Minecity map](https://ashkiano.com/minecity/). Full credit for these amazing models goes to the original creators of that map – I only created the datapack that brings them to life dynamically.

That’s it! Now enjoy realistic flying aircraft across your Minecraft skies! 🚁🛩️🌍

💬 Got ideas for new aircraft? Join my [Discord](https://discord.ashcraft.cz/) and let me know what I should add next!
